description:
GIVEN a user is not entitled for game playback
AND MAST v3 is in break glass mode

**NOTE: If MAST v3 is not in break glass mode, test on a browser**
Log in as an entitled user, initiate playback of a game, copy the playback url, log out the entitled user

steps.action:
WHEN the user selects a game for playback
AND DSS returns a not entitled error

**NOTE: If MAST v3 is not in break glass mode, test on a browser**
Log in with an un-entitled user, paste the playback URL in the browser
steps.result:
THEN a full page modal displays letting the user know they are not entitled for content playback
AND an "Okay" button is displayed with focus
AND the user is navigated to the Home page after selecting the "Okay" button
